Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, date_trunc('month', date_add('second', -900, ts_pivot.timestamp)) AS timestamp, count(DISTINCT (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state)) AS sample_count, (count(DISTINCT (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state)) * sum(bs.weight)) / CAST(sum(1) AS DECIMAL) AS units_count, sum(1) / CAST(count(DISTINCT (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state)) AS DECIMAL) AS rows_per_sample, sum(ts_pivot."bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__baseline", sum(coalesce(ts_pivot."up__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", ts_pivot."bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption") * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__upgrade", sum((coalesce(ts_pivot."bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", 0) - coalesce(coalesce(ts_pivot."up__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", ts_pivot."bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption"), 0)) * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__savings", sum(ts_pivot."bs__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption__baseline", sum(coalesce(ts_pivot."up__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption", ts_pivot."bs__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption") * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption__upgrade", sum((coalesce(ts_pivot."bs__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption", 0) - coalesce(coalesce(ts_pivot."up__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption", ts_pivot."bs__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption"), 0)) * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption__savings" 
FROM (SELECT comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.bldg_id AS bldg_id, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state AS state, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.timestamp AS timestamp, sum(CASE WHEN (comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade = 0) THEN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" ELSE NULL END) AS "bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", sum(CASE WHEN (comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade = 1) THEN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" ELSE NULL END) AS "up__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", sum(CASE WHEN (comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade = 0) THEN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" ELSE NULL END) AS "bs__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption", sum(CASE WHEN (comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade = 1) THEN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" ELSE NULL END) AS "up__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state 
WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade IN (0, 1) AND comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state IN ('CO', 'NM') GROUP BY comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.bldg_id, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.timestamp) AS ts_pivot JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = ts_pivot.bldg_id AND bs.state = ts_pivot.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state IN ('CO', 'NM') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/055220bcd00e5692da8315e8b75e5c7a2744269d5733218577bcaec7d82f51e8/acf18006-43d8-45a0-8fd9-df723a55bea7/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
